traddon.race.diamond_sovereign.descripti: A being of pure, blinding light contained within a diamond-hard exterior. They no longer "walk"; they exist as a focal point of the worlds laws.
traddon.race.geode_golem.description: The crystals have grown into a humanoid shape. Their chest cavity contains a hollow "Heart" filled with glowing, liquid magicules
traddon.race.prism_knight.description: A towering figure clad in armor made of interlocking crystal plates that refract light into dazzling displays. They wield a massive crystalline sword that can cut through almost anything.
traddon.race.shardling.description: A small, floating cluster of jagged crystals held together by a faint magnetic core. They are often mistaken for raw ore until they move.
traddon.skill.crystal_dust.description: Summon a cloud of crystal dust that obscures vision and damages enemies within its area.
traddon.skill.devastator.description: A unique skill that allows the user to unleash devastating attacks.
traddon.skill.deviator.description: A unique skill that allows the user to deviate from their normal abilities.
traddon.skill.disruptor.description: Disruptor is a skill that allows the user to manipulate the laws of space and gravity to disrupt the enemy's mind and motion.
traddon.skill.dragon_spirit_haki.descrip: Powerful Haki that allows the user to imbue their aura with various magical and physical properties, allowing it to both exert a powerful spiritual pressure over their targets, inflict them with potentially lethal magical effects and cause them actual physical damage.
traddon.skill.exoskeleton.description: The user's body is covered in a hard, protective shell that increases their defense.
traddon.skill.holy_demolisher_fist.descr: The user can summon a giant fist made of holy energy to crush their enemies.
traddon.skill.material_creation.descript: The user can create materials out of thin air.
traddon.skill.necromancer.no_souls: Not enough souls to summon undead.
traddon.skill.photon_blade.description: Summon a blade of pure light that can cut through almost anything. The blade's power increases with the user's mastery of the skill.
traddon.skill.refractive_shell.descripti: The golem’s outer layer is composed of hyper-compressed, high-purity crystals. This shell acts as a multi-layered filter that can bend, split, and neutralize magical energy upon contact.
traddon.skill.resonant_core.description: The golem's core is a unique crystalline structure that resonates with the world's magic. By attuning to this core, the golem can temporarily enhance its abilities, gaining increased strength, speed, and magical resistance for a short duration.
traddon.skill.total_reflection.descripti: A unique skill that allows the user to reflect and absorb incoming attacks, converting them into stored energy for future use.
